aboutPanel.title: About
aboutPanel.tagline: Professional PDF editing, free and open source.
aboutPanel.description: View, annotate, edit, and manage PDF documents with a full-featured editor built on open standards. No subscriptions, no license fees, no vendor lock-in.
aboutPanel.companyDescription: Developing, supporting, and promoting open source software for the construction industry and beyond. Transparent pricing, transparent code.
aboutPanel.license: Licensed under MIT. Free for personal and commercial use.

openPanel.title: Open
openPanel.noFilesInFolder: No PDF files in this folder

importPanel.title: Import
importPanel.importXfdfDesc: Import annotations from an XFDF file into the current document

exportPanel.title: Export
exportPanel.exportImagesDesc: Save pages as PNG or JPEG image files
exportPanel.exportRasterDesc: Flatten pages and annotations into a new PDF with rasterized images
exportPanel.exportXfdfDesc: Export all annotations to an XFDF file for sharing or backup
